jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Shiprocket
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shiprocket. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!
